_comment: Source of truth for /projects. Mirrors zabalgames.com/projects. Edit this file to add/remove projects — the page renders from it on load, no rebuild needed. type: extend | fork | build. Omit 'repo' for concept-stage and add 'spec'.

projects.name: ZAOOS
projects.desc: Monorepo lab and gated Farcaster client — social feed, audio/video spaces, governance.

projects.name: ZAONEXUS
projects.desc: Searchable directory of 200+ ecosystem links with dark/light mode.

projects.name: ZAO-Leaderboard
projects.desc: Onchain leaderboard ranking members by Respect holdings on Optimism.

projects.name: zao-claude-skills
projects.desc: Library of Claude Code skills for ecosystem tasks — meeting capture, research, distribution.

projects.name: ZAOscribe
projects.desc: Discord bot recording per-speaker audio, transcribing, and extracting action items.

projects.name: wavewarzapp
projects.desc: Fan spectator app for WaveWarZ Solana music battles with real-time stats.

projects.name: songjam-site
projects.desc: Leaderboard aggregating Farcaster, Space, and timeline contribution points.

projects.name: zpoidh
projects.desc: BetterCallZaal bounty ops home with rounds, judging, and leaderboards.

projects.name: CoCConcertZ
projects.desc: Virtual-concert platform and Farcaster Mini App with artist portals, chat, galleries.

projects.name: zlank
projects.desc: No-code Farcaster Snap builder with 11 block types and live preview. FarHack 2026 winner.

projects.name: fishbowlz
projects.desc: Persistent audio rooms with hot-seat rotation, transcripts, token gating, and tipping.

projects.name: nouns-snap
projects.desc: Example Snap browsing Nouns DAO NFTs — image, owner, live auction.

projects.name: duodo-snap
projects.desc: Example Snap for Duo Do music fundraiser with goal tracker and event info.

projects.name: zabalsnap1
projects.desc: Example Snap with ZABAL token tracker, burn tracker, leaderboard, and share.

projects.name: ltaesnap
projects.desc: Example Snap for the Let The Artist Eat podcast with episode cards and host profiles.

projects.name: ZAOVideoEditor
projects.desc: Local-first video editor for conversation content with AI transcription and captions.

projects.name: zaomusicbot
projects.desc: Discord music bot (Lavalink + discord.js) with lofi and radio commands.

projects.name: zaostock
projects.desc: Dashboard for the ZAOstock 2026 festival in Maine with team login and volunteer signup.

projects.name: ZAOfractal
projects.desc: Governance documentation hub for ZAO Fractal — the weekly Respect Game on Optimism.

projects.name: fractalbot
projects.desc: Respect Game bot with voting flows, onchain token submission, Snapshot integration.

projects.name: /zabal mini app
projects.desc: Farcaster Mini App season hub — workshop schedule, join counter, submissions board.

projects.name: zabalartsubmission
projects.desc: ZABAL Live Hub — voting on livestream direction (Studio / Market / Social / Battle).

projects.name: bcz-yapz
projects.desc: Long-form interview show site with searchable episodes, transcripts, YouTube chapters.

projects.name: farscout
projects.desc: Autonomous Farcaster research scout reading casts and triaging novelty via Discord.

projects.name: ZAOcowork
projects.desc: Task tracker with Telegram bot, Next.js Kanban UI, and a research-dispatch pipeline.

projects.name: hermes-orchestrator
projects.desc: Supervisor framework for agentic systems — classify, spawn, monitor agents with pluggable adapters.

projects.name: WARZAI
projects.desc: WaveWarZ AI agent (ElizaOS) with Solana onchain integration.

projects.name: Aurdour
projects.desc: Browser-based two-deck DJ platform with real-time mixing, effects, and Flow Mode auto-DJ.

projects.name: Zuke
projects.desc: White-label live audio-rooms surface for Farcaster communities with listener badges.

projects.name: zaoprojects
projects.desc: ZAO ecosystem progress-timeline dashboard (early v0.1) wired to a data source.

groups.name: Early-stage
groups.label: starters
groups.note: Scaffolds and templates ready to fork.

projects.name: ZAO 101
projects.desc: Static onboarding guide (home, pillars, join, FAQ) with placeholder scaffolding.

projects.name: ZOUNZ
projects.desc: Farcaster music NFT mini app — browse / create collections, mint on Base.

projects.name: ZAOFlights
projects.desc: Conversational flight-search scaffold (Next.js chat + results split).

projects.name: zlank-snap-template
projects.desc: Starter template for hand-built Farcaster Snaps (Hono + Vercel + SDK).

groups.name: Concept
groups.label: to build
groups.note: Specced and open for a builder to pick up — start from the rails, ship in the open.

projects.name: A new ZOE skill
projects.desc: Extend the ZOE concierge bot (Telegram) with Claude Code CLI subprocesses.

projects.name: WaveWarZ-Base Finals settlement
projects.desc: Wire WaveWarZ-Base contracts into the Finals page — read battle state, per-finalist trade view.

projects.name: Songjam leaderboard migration
projects.desc: Move the leaderboard off the X scraper to an Empire Builder leaderboard on Farcaster-native data.

projects.name: POIDH bounty leaderboard
projects.desc: Empire Builder leaderboard counting unique POIDH bounty submitters across all bounties.

projects.name: COC Concertz content pipeline
projects.desc: Automate the cross-post end — Descript export to X, Bluesky, Discord, Farcaster.

projects.name: Concert discovery + calendar
projects.desc: Surface concert events — filter by date/genre/venue, calendar export, Farcaster cast.

projects.name: zlank Empire daily-stats Snap
projects.desc: One-click "Today's Empire Builder stats" Snap template on zlank (kmac.eth + Zaal collab).

projects.name: ZAO Snaps tab on zlank
projects.desc: Curated tab of 8 pre-built Snap templates for ZAO use cases (leaderboard, ZOE claim, RSVP).

projects.name: Twitch to Empire Builder feed
projects.desc: Feed StreamElements WebSocket events into the Empire Builder leaderboard for live creator stats.

projects.name: Streaming auto-clip flywheel
projects.desc: Turn hours of stream into short clips (TikTok, Reels, Shorts, Farcaster) via ZAOVideoEditor.

projects.name: ZABAL Gamez judging system
projects.desc: July judging — wallet/Farcaster + GitHub signup, rolling admission, Bonfire scoring.

projects.name: Knowledge-game report scorer
projects.desc: Builders write reports indexed into the Bonfire graph; scored by citation frequency in daily summaries.
